name: harness-flow
description: HarnessFlow — From idea to shipped product: high-quality engineering workflows for AI agents. Spec-anchored SDD, gated TDD, evidence-based routing, independent reviews, formal closeout, and v0.6.0+ always-on orchestrator agent persona (agents/hf-orchestrator.md) replacing using-hf-workflow + hf-workflow-router.

agents.name: hf-orchestrator
agents.description: HarnessFlow always-on orchestrator persona. Decides Workflow Profile, Execution Mode, Workspace Isolation, canonical next skill, reviewer dispatch, recovery, hotfix/increment branching. Loaded automatically per session.
